caption: A man in a dark blue suit and tie engages in a conversation with another man wearing a dark blazer over a light blue shirt. They are seated in a large, open indoor venue with a polished floor, likely a convention center, with other people and structures visible in the distant background. Between them sits a table holding a laptop and several papers. The man on the left gestures with his hands while speaking, while the man on the right listens attentively. A graphic overlay at the bottom of the screen identifies the event as "MONGODB WORLD 2022" and includes the hashtags "#MDW22 | #theCUBE". The overlay also features the "theCUBE" logo, the text "From the Javits Center, New York, NY", and a "Sponsored By MongoDB" logo. As the sequence progresses, the man on the left shifts his posture and hand gestures, while the man on the right remains relatively still.
